mapper.select: select * FROM products WHERE status='APPROVED' limit #{start},#{blockList}
mapper.update: update products set category_id=#{category_id}, name=#{name}, description=#{description}, price=#{price}, sale_price=#{sale_price}, stock=#{stock}, delivery_fee=#{delivery_fee}, free_shipping=#{free_shipping}, status=#{status}, image_l=#{image_l}, image_s=#{image_s}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where product_id=#{product_id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from products where status='APPROVED'
